notes: One atomic White-Okunev cross-sectional package: rank all seven USD crosses, hold one foreign-currency long and one foreign-currency short, and reject standalone component results.
Q02 uses the synchronized 2017-2024 D1 intersection; AUDUSD, NZDUSD, USDCAD, and USDCHF define the 2024 end bound.
The tester host is EURUSD.DWX. The logical symbol is evidence identity only and is never sent to MT5 as a custom market symbol.
Friday close is disabled because monthly rank retention is a source rule; hard ATR stops, basket loss kill, and framework kill switch remain active.
No standalone result, live preset, portfolio admission, or decorrelation claim is authorized by this repair.
